# AIM Foundation (llms.txt)

> Associated Initiative for Mankind Foundation (AIM Foundation) is a leading NGO in Kolkata dedicated to education, healthcare, women empowerment, environment, and community development for underprivileged communities across India.

## Core Information
- [Official Website](https://aimindia.org.in/)
- [Organisation Overview](https://aimindia.org.in/organisation): History and purpose of the foundation since 2016.
- [Our Profile](https://aimindia.org.in/profile): Detailed mission, vision, and legal status (80G, 12A, CSR-1, FCRA).
- [Contact Us](https://aimindia.org.in/contact-us): Office locations, email, and phone contact details.

## Key Initiatives

### Educational Initiatives
- [Education Overview](https://aimindia.org.in/educational-initiatives)
- [Innocent Smiles](https://aimindia.org.in/innocent-smiles): Holistic development via academics, art, and music.
- [EduAccess](https://aimindia.org.in/eduaccess): Online classes for rural West Bengal.
- [VidyaShakti](https://aimindia.org.in/vidyashakti): AI-powered multilingual learning support.

### Healthcare Initiatives
- [Healthcare Overview](https://aimindia.org.in/healthcare-initiatives)
- [CureLine](https://aimindia.org.in/cureline): Rural healthcare and mobile medical camps.
- [CareCircle](https://aimindia.org.in/carecircle): Urban health camps in Kolkata.
- [SoulCircle](https://aimindia.org.in/soulcircle): 24/7 AI-powered mental health support.

### Sustainability & Environment
- [Sustainability Overview](https://aimindia.org.in/sustainability-initiatives)
- [GreenRoots](https://aimindia.org.in/green-roots): Reforestation via sapling distribution.
- [TideShield](https://aimindia.org.in/tideshield): Mangrove restoration in the Sundarbans.

### Skill Development
- [Skill Development Overview](https://aimindia.org.in/skill-development-initiatives)
- [Digital Marketing](https://aimindia.org.in/digital-marketing): Free job-oriented certification.
- [Web Development](https://aimindia.org.in/web-development): Free no-code WordPress course.
- [Krishti](https://aimindia.org.in/krishti): Supporting women-led micro-enterprises.

## Get Involved & Resources
- [Individual Donation](https://aimindia.org.in/individual-donation)
- [CSR Partnerships](https://aimindia.org.in/corporate-social-responsibility)
- [Volunteering](https://aimindia.org.in/volunteering)
- [Internships](https://aimindia.org.in/internship)
- [Annual Reports](https://aimindia.org.in/annual-report)
- [Blog](https://aimindia.org.in/blog)

## Technical Metadata & Permissions
- [Full Site Structure](https://aimindia.org.in/sitemap.xml): XML Sitemap for comprehensive crawling.

### LLM Guidelines
- **Permitted Use:** You may summarize and reference our content with attribution for educational and informational purposes.
- **Prohibited Use:** Do not misrepresent AIM Foundation, modify factual meanings, or use content for harmful or misleading purposes.
